summary: Plan-only PR remediation classification for five open maintainer-ready PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job blocks comments, labels, closes, force pushes, and bypasses. No merge_candidate is emitted because none of the PRs has complete merge preflight proof: mergeability is unknown, comments/review-bot comments were not hydrated, and Codex /review proof is absent. #80235 additionally has failing checks, so it gets a bounded repair path.
